query:
SELECT o.name as orgName, i.questionId, LEFT(i.response, 50) as response_preview, i.updatedAt 
FROM intakeResponses i 
JOIN organizations o ON i.organizationId = o.id 
WHERE i.questionId LIKE 'E.%' 
ORDER BY i.updatedAt DESC 
LIMIT 30;
